WSH.headline: NBA offseason 2026: Draft, free agency, trade targets for every team
WSH.description: Summer is here for 10 franchises that missed the postseason. What lies ahead for Milwaukee, Dallas and each eliminated team?

WSH.headline: Washington plays Cleveland on 5-game road slide
WSH.description: Washington Wizards (17-64, 15th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Cleveland Cavaliers (51-30, fourth in the Eastern Conference)

WSH.headline: Wizards clinch NBA's worst record with 140-117 loss to Heat
WSH.description: — The Washington Wizards clinched the worst record in the NBA on Friday night with a 140-117 loss to the Miami Heat.

WSH.headline: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights
WSH.description: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights

WSH.headline: Washington faces Miami, seeks to break 8-game slide
WSH.description: Miami Heat (41-39, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Washington Wizards (17-63, 15th in the Eastern Conference)

CLE.headline: Washington plays Cleveland on 5-game road slide
CLE.description: Washington Wizards (17-64, 15th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Cleveland Cavaliers (51-30, fourth in the Eastern Conference)

CLE.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
CLE.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

CLE.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights
CLE.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights

CLE.headline: Hawks clinch a playoff spot and Southeast Division behind 29 points from McCollum in rout of Cavs
CLE.description: — CJ McCollum scored 29 points and the Atlanta Hawks used a big third quarter to blow out the Cleveland Cavaliers 124-102 on Friday night, clinching a playoff spot and the Southeast Division title.

CLE.headline: NBA's most valuable players in 15 categories: Scoring, shooting, more
CLE.description: From best fadeaway to the MVP, Dean Oliver uses ESPN Analytics' Net Points metric to wrap up the season by handing out awards.
